zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret Brailsford於大約1339年出生在英國英格蘭爾時，她的父親Ralph Brailsford34歲，母親Joan de Twyford41歲。她於大約1350年與Ralph de Vernon在英國爾希布盧可結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。她去世於1429年11月享年91歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret Brailsford于大约1339年出生在英国英格兰爾时，她的父亲Ralph Brailsford34岁，母亲Joan de Twyford41岁。她于大约1350年与Ralph de Vernon在英国爾希布盧可结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。她去世于1429年11月享年91岁。

nameMeanings.name: Brailsford
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (East Midlands and Yorkshire): habitational name from a place in Derbyshire named Brailsford, possibly from an Old English word brægels, a metathesized form of bærgels, itself a byform of byrgels ‘tumulus, barrow’, + ford ‘ford’.

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret Brailsford was born about 1339, in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Ralph Brailsford, was 34 and her mother, Joan de Twyford, was 41. She married Ralph de Vernon about 1350, in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. She died in November 1429, at the age of 91.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret Brailsford est née environ 1339, à Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Ralph Brailsford, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Joan de Twyford, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Ralph de Vernon environ 1350, à Shipbrook, Cheshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Elle est décédée en novembre 1429, à l’âge de 91 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margaret Brailsford um 1339 in Cheshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Ralph Brailsford 34 und ihre Mutter Joan de Twyford 41. Sie hat um 1350 in Shipbrook, Cheshire, England Ralph de Vernon geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Sie starb im November 1429 im Alter von 91 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brailsford è nata il circa 1339 nel Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Ralph Brailsford, aveva 34 anni e sua madre, Joan de Twyford, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Ralph de Vernon circa 1350, nel Shipbrook, Cheshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì nel novembre 1429, all'età di 91 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret Brailsford(이)가 대략 1339년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Ralph Brailsford(은)는 34세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Twyford(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1350년 영국 체실르 시브룩에서 Ralph de Vernon(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 11월 91세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret Brailsford nasceu aproximadamente 1339, em Cheshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Ralph Brailsford, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Twyford, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Ralph de Vernon aproximadamente 1350, em Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em novembro de 1429, com 91 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret Brailsford родилась около 1339 г. в местности чешир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Ralph Brailsford было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Joan de Twyford, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Ralph de Vernon около 1350 г. в местности шипбрук, чешир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Она умерла ноябрь 1429 г. в возрасте 91 год.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margaret Brailsford nació aproximadamente 1339, en Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Ralph Brailsford, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Joan de Twyford, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Ralph de Vernon aproximadamente 1350, en Shipbrook, Cheshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió en noviembre de 1429, a la edad de 91 años.
